title: The Winterguard Pack
description: Combining multiple magic and tech mods for the ultimate kitchen sink of fabric. (∩^o^)⊃━☆
body:
Combining multiple magic and tech mods for the ultimate kitchen sink of fabric. (∩^o^)⊃━☆

Contains just about 210+ mods! Including:
- Bewitchment
- Origins
- Create

It's recommended to allocate at LEAST 3GB of RAM with this modpack, as the amount of mods present eats up ram quite a bit. I personally play with 4GB with no issues.

This pack was made for the Winterguard community server.
